series_metadata.series_description: Long term care reconciliation project documentation for nursing home credit balances not included in the Combined Proposed Adjudication Order (final fiscal audits) which was completed in 2007. Documentation includes, but is not limited to, spreadsheets with providers and dollar amounts, certification numbers for mailing, response letters, results, and statistics.All active records identified as being needed by the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) for their daily operations as of July 1, 2013, were transferred by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to ODM. Any records that are inactive and identified as being not necessary for daily operations by ODM were retained by ODJFS.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 7 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits are completed and released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred
